#  View the Budget for a Project in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with the [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) and [Capital Planning](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-capital-planning) products in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The Budget tab within the Cost Tracker allows you to build project budgets with variances and anticipated costs. There are two different budgeting methods that you can use in Portfolio Financials: a _broken down budget_ , which will allow you to assign budgets to individual cost items through the Cost Tracker, and an _overall (lump sum) budget_ , where you have one amount for the entire project. Budgets must be published in order to show on the Cost Tracker and the Published Budget History window.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' permissions can only view budgeted amounts for cost items that they have access to.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Cost Tracker** section of the **Project Page**.
  2. Click the **Budget** tab.
  3. View the budget.
  4. Click the **arrow** ![Icon Solid Arrow Pfcp](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c16cdd2d8c5e9e4ca5452d98480e41c4/dc8ebf4907cec8e0eee40aeb24f197d0/icon-solid-arrow-pfcp.png?fm=webp&h=15) icons in the Cost Item columns to view items within a section if necessary.
  5. _Optional:_ Click the drop-down menu in the 'Published' column to view other published versions of the budget. 
#####  Tip
If you want to view the published budget history, see [View Published Budget History for a Project in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-published-budget-history-for-a-project-in-portfolio-financials).


## See Also
  * [View Published Budget History for a Project in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/view-published-budget-history-for-a-project-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Add or Manage Schedule of Values for a Budget in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/add-or-manage-schedule-of-values-for-a-budget-in-portfolio-financials)

description: How to view the budget for a project in Portfolio Financials.
